tutorial.step1Description: Your temporary email is ready. Use it to sign up for websites without revealing your real email address.
tutorial.step2Description: When you receive emails with verification codes (OTPs), they will appear here automatically. Just click to copy!
tutorial.step3Description: Create as many inboxes as you need. Archive old ones or switch between them easily.

productTour.completedToast: Tour complete - you're ready to go!
productTour.demoEndedOnboarding: Demo ended — create a real address to continue

welcome.title: Welcome to 1Click
welcome.body: This short tour shows the main parts of the extension: temp email, inbox, autofill helpers, and settings.

tempEmail.title: Your temporary email
tempEmail.body: This is your disposable address. Click it to copy. Use the chevrons to switch inboxes, or open the list for Live / Inactive accounts.

doubleTapCopy.title: Double-tap to copy
doubleTapCopy.body: Double-click (or double-tap) the address bar to copy your temp email quickly to the clipboard.

createInbox.title: Create more inboxes
createInbox.body: Tap + to generate another address. Useful when you want a fresh alias for a new signup.

searchFilter.title: Search & filters
searchFilter.body: Find messages by text, OTP, sender, or date. Sort from here or from the View menu on the tabs row.

emailList.title: Inbox tabs
emailList.body: Switch between Inbox, Archived, Deleted, and All. Labels appear here too - tap a label to filter. Use View for page size, favicons, threads, and sort.

holdSelect.title: Hold to multi-select
holdSelect.body: Long-press an email row to open the selection strip. Star, add a label, delete, or archive selected messages. Action buttons hide while you select.

footerNav.title: Main navigation
footerNav.body: Jump between Mailbox, Addresses, Autofill (Profiles & Credentials), and More for Organize, Activity, Settings, and About.

manageInboxes.title: Manage inboxes
manageInboxes.body: Here you can archive, export, or open any address. Live vs Inactive tabs keep active sessions separate from expired ones.

autofillHub.title: Autofill manager
autofillHub.body: Everything for filling signup forms lives here. Open Autofill from the bottom nav anytime.

autofillProfiles.title: Profiles
autofillProfiles.body: Profiles are person templates (name, DOB, avatar, address). Pick a default profile for Autofill All on websites.

autofillCredentials.title: Credentials
autofillCredentials.body: Credentials are saved when you autofill a signup. Reuse email and password on the same site — not a full password manager.

settings.title: Settings
settings.body: Search preferences, theme, providers, autofill blocklist, and backup/export. Replay this tour anytime from here or About.

done.title: You're set!
done.body: Use your temp email on signup forms — Autofill fills fields and surfaces OTPs. Right-click the extension icon for Autofill this page. Type 1c in the address bar to search credentials. Replay this tour from About.

errors.inboxAlreadyExists: Inbox with this address already exists
errors.inboxSessionConflict: Email session conflict - unable to create unique inbox
errors.formNotFound: No signup form found on this page

onboarding.welcomeDescription: Create instant disposable email addresses to protect your privacy. No sign-up required.
onboarding.feature1Description: Generate a disposable email in one click
onboarding.feature3Description: All data stored locally in your browser
onboarding.chooseProviderDescription: Select a provider to create your first temporary email address.
onboarding.importBackupHint: Restore data from a previously exported JSON backup
onboarding.retryWithOtherProvider: Select another provider and try again

about.title: 1Click - Temp Mail & Autofill Form
about.description: A privacy-focused Chrome extension for generating temporary email addresses and auto-filling web forms.

otp.a: When a message contains a verification code, it is detected automatically. Open the OTP strip or message to copy the code. You can allow one-click fill on the current site from the OTP strip.

autofill.a: On signup pages the extension can fill email, password, name, and more using your active mailbox and selected identity. Confirm-email fields receive the same address. Use the blocklist in Settings to skip sites you do not want filled.

export.q: Can I back up my data?
export.a: Yes. Settings → Export/Import lets you choose categories (settings, identities, logins, inboxes). Optional password protection encrypts the backup file.

privacy.a: Inbox data, OTPs, and saved logins stay in your browser extension storage. Passwords are encrypted at rest. We do not operate a central account for your mail content.

renew.a: Some providers allow extending a temporary address before it expires. Enable auto-renew on an inbox or use the renewal strip when an address expires.

tour.q: How do I learn the UI again?
tour.a: Open Settings or About and choose “Take product tour”. Double-tap your address to copy; long-press an email to open multi-select (star, label, delete, archive).

activity.title: Activity
activity.subtitle: Your extension usage and timeline.
activity.resetDialogBody: This will permanently delete all activity events and reset all stats (inboxes, emails, OTPs, notifications). Tracking will start fresh from this moment.

errorBoundary.body: An unexpected error occurred. You can revert your last action, hard-reset the app, or try again.
errorBoundary.hardResetNoExportWarn: No backup export was found on this device. Hard reset permanently wipes local data. Export a JSON backup first if you want to restore later.
errorBoundary.hardResetExportedHint: Last backup export: {date}. You can hard reset now, or cancel and export a fresh copy.

intelligence.notificationsHint: Quiet hours, OTP-only alerts, and muted senders. Local only — not a vault.
intelligence.groupDigest: Group multiple emails into one notification
intelligence.suggestFreshAddress: {address} used on many sites — consider a fresh address
intelligence.rulesHint: If a site matches a domain pattern, use a specific identity and provider, and optionally auto-archive the inbox after N days.

privacy.notPasswordManagerTitle: Temp-mail autofill — not a password manager
privacy.notPasswordManagerBody: Saved logins store disposable signup credentials for replay on the same site only. Use a dedicated password manager for real accounts and master passwords.
privacy.clipboardHint: After copying OTPs or sensitive values, automatically clear the clipboard so they are not left for other apps.

playground.title: Autofill playground
playground.subtitle: Fixtures for signup / login / OTP QA
playground.serveHint: Serve fixture pages from the repo, then open them in a tab:
playground.signupBody: Expect field icons + Autofill All. Confirm-email twins should sync.
playground.loginBody: Autofill All should NOT appear (login form).
playground.otpBody: Use with a received OTP / Wait-for-OTP panel.
playground.checklist: Checklist: create inbox → fill signup → archive OTP email (strip hides) → edit identity from Autofill menu.
